name: Perfect Steamed Rice (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup grated sharp cheddar cheese or parmesan
1/4 cup thin strips of black forest ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice, water, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Bring liquid to a boil over medium heat.
3. Cover and simmer over low heat until the rice is tender as desired (about 18 minutes).
4. If there is any leftover liquid in the pot, drain the rice using a strainer.
5. Remove half of the rice for another day.
6. To remaining rice, stir in butter and cheese (and/or ham). Adjust seasoning as needed.
